DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lily R. Robinson, Esq., from Bryan Cave LLP, 415-675-3405, for Defendant and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
